location.label: Terminal options dropdown chevron (∨) in terminal tab bar
location.name: Terminal options dropdown chevron (∨) in terminal tab bar
location.reasoning: In the Terminal panel tab bar I see 'Terminal: Local ×' tab, a '+' (new terminal) button, and a chevron/arrow (∨) dropdown. The chevron is the Terminal options menu. Candidate z29 matches the chevron icon location to the right of the '+' button. The 'Local' tab close (z30), '+' (z32), and 'Terminal:' label (z5/z17) are different controls. Clicking the chevron opens the terminal options menu.
